title: Anna Daccache Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Anna Daccache Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Anna Daccache
Align Student
MS in Computer Science ’22
Silicon Valley Campus
Anna Daccache had been interested in public health for some time. It wasn’t until discovering the Align program, though, that the opportunities she was looking for opened to her. When she got to work on a co-op with the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services, their data-driven approach to health care helped her feel that she was making an impact where it mattered most.
I was really excited … to do high-impact work, especially in a space that I personally care about and feel connected to. … Khoury focuses so much on marrying your experiences rather than erasing one and putting CS or data science on top of it, so I felt really supported
Anna Daccache, Align MSCS ’22
Explore all Khoury stories
